action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.6196 (val post-tau=0.608) via cRT (Focal+mixup/cutmix rand p=0.5 s1-60ep, CE+count-s2-40ep on head, RandAug, pretrained RN50, tau~1.45 grid). Few-shot 0.448, many/medium 0.771/0.624. Stage vals ~0.568->0.585. Iter~6min, 1.59h/9 iters left. Analysis: Strong LT setup (IR=100); metrics.jsonl logging missing (curves incomplete); s1 feats can improve w/ stronger aug (add AutoAugment) + 80ep; named-param freeze prevents prior grad bugs; tau grid effective. Decision: Full clean train.py rewrite (add log_metrics per epoch/stage, s1=80ep, AutoAugment+RandAug, proper freeze/opt/scheduler/best-save/tau-grid 0-3@0.05, seeds, metrics only, complete CIFARDataset+mix/cut logic); keep model/predict; train+submit_eval immediately (targets >0.62, follows >20ep rule, fits budget).
